news.title:
Apollo Tyres, Honasa Consumer, KPR Mill, HCL Tech, and KEC Int'l see volume surges.
The update notes stock movements with no journalist analysis or commentary included.
news.summary:

news.title:
KEC International surged 8% after securing ₹2,518-cr orders across sectors, boosting investor sentiment.
Despite order wins, Axis Securities projects flat Q4FY26 revenue and PAT drop due to margin pressures.
news.summary:
KEC International surged 8% after securing ₹2,518-cr orders across sectors, boosting investor sentiment.
Despite order wins, Axis Securities projects flat Q4FY26 revenue and PAT drop due to margin pressures.

news.title:
KEC International issued a corporate guarantee of Rs 310 crore for Al Sharif Group unit.
The guarantee is tied to obligations of KEC Limited within the group.
news.summary:
KEC International issued a corporate guarantee of Rs 310 crore for Al Sharif Group unit.
The guarantee is tied to obligations of KEC Limited within the group.

news.title:
NTPC expands capacity to 89,128 MW, signs nuclear MoU with EDF; KEC International secures orders worth ₹2,518 crore.
Lupin, Zydus gain USFDA nod for diabetes drugs; Bosch plans to acquire Bosch Chassis Systems India to boost mobility offerings.
news.summary:
NTPC expands capacity to 89,128 MW, signs nuclear MoU with EDF; KEC International secures orders worth ₹2,518 crore.
Lupin, Zydus gain USFDA nod for diabetes drugs; Bosch plans to acquire Bosch Chassis Systems India to boost mobility offerings.

news.title:
Stocks to watch include TCS, GM Breweries, NTPC, Bosch, NHPC, and KEC.
Updates include corporate announcements and brief company highlights.
news.summary:
Stocks to watch include TCS, GM Breweries, NTPC, Bosch, NHPC, and KEC.

news.title:
KEC International issued a SAR 125M corporate guarantee for subsidiary's banking facility.
No promoter involvement; potential contingent liability but no current impact on parent company.
news.summary:
KEC International issued a SAR 125M corporate guarantee for subsidiary's banking facility.
No promoter involvement; potential contingent liability but no current impact on parent company.

news.title:
KEC International secures new orders worth Rs. 2,518 cr across various businesses, including civil, transportation, and T&D.
The civil segment wins its largest-ever real estate order, while T&D expands globally with projects in Africa, Europe, and the Americas.
news.summary:
KEC International secures new orders worth Rs. 2,518 cr across various businesses, including civil, transportation, and T&D.
The civil segment wins its largest-ever real estate order, while T&D expands globally with projects in Africa, Europe, and the Americas.

news.title:
KEC Intl, HBL Engineering, and Kernex Microsystems gain focus on Kavach updates.
HBL secured ₹1,375.4Cr orders; Kernex partners with BHEL for advanced signalling solutions.
news.summary:
KEC Intl, HBL Engineering, and Kernex Microsystems gain focus on Kavach updates.
HBL secured ₹1,375.4Cr orders; Kernex partners with BHEL for advanced signalling solutions.

news.title:
KEC International announces redemption of Commercial Paper worth Rs.150 Cr on March 30, 2026.
The company confirms full payment of the redemption amount as per SEBI guidelines.
news.summary:
KEC International announces redemption of Commercial Paper worth Rs.150 Cr on March 30, 2026.
The company confirms full payment of the redemption amount as per SEBI guidelines.

news.title:
KEC International Ltd. redeemed its listed commercial paper worth Rs. 75 crore on March 23, 2026.
The redemption amount was paid as per SEBI regulations, with ISIN INE389H14LV0.
news.summary:
KEC International Ltd. redeemed its listed commercial paper worth Rs. 75 crore on March 23, 2026.
The redemption amount was paid as per SEBI regulations, with ISIN INE389H14LV0.

news.title:
KEC International redeemed Commercial Paper worth Rs. 50 crore on March 16, 2026.
The redemption aligns with SEBI guidelines, as per the company's prior intimation letter.
news.summary:
KEC International redeemed Commercial Paper worth Rs. 50 crore on March 16, 2026.
The redemption aligns with SEBI guidelines, as per the company's prior intimation letter.

news.title:
KEC International jumps 5% on securing ₹1,476 crore orders from Saudi Arabia, Africa, and Americas.
Stock faces selling pressure, down 11% in a month, with bearish trends and resistance near ₹605.
news.summary:
KEC International jumps 5% on securing ₹1,476 crore orders from Saudi Arabia, Africa, and Americas.
Stock faces selling pressure, down 11% in a month, with bearish trends and resistance near ₹605.

news.title:
Wipro secures a multi-year contract with TruStage for tech transformation; Borosil faces production issues due to LPG supply restrictions.
Ashok Leyland invests ₹400-500 Cr in battery facility; Omnitech wins ₹920 Cr order; KEC bags ₹1,476 Cr projects; Hatsun merger approved.
news.summary:
Wipro secures a multi-year contract with TruStage for tech transformation; Borosil faces production issues due to LPG supply restrictions.
Ashok Leyland invests ₹400-500 Cr in battery facility; Omnitech wins ₹920 Cr order; KEC bags ₹1,476 Cr projects; Hatsun merger approved.

news.title:
KEC International secures Rs. 1,476 crore Transmission orders across India, Middle East, Africa, and Americas.
Orders include 380 kV composite project in Saudi Arabia and 132 kV lines in Africa.
news.summary:
KEC International secures Rs. 1,476 crore Transmission orders across India, Middle East, Africa, and Americas.
Orders include 380 kV composite project in Saudi Arabia and 132 kV lines in Africa.

news.title:
KEC International gains 1.64%, closing at ₹547.75 as Jal Jeevan Mission gets ₹8.69 lakh crore lifeline.
KEC holds ₹1,600 crore JJM orders in ₹39,300 crore backlog; faces risks from delayed payments, new scheme rollout.
news.summary:
KEC International gains 1.64%, closing at ₹547.75 as Jal Jeevan Mission gets ₹8.69 lakh crore lifeline.
KEC holds ₹1,600 crore JJM orders in ₹39,300 crore backlog; faces risks from delayed payments, new scheme rollout.

news.title:
KEC expects ₹800 crore Jal Jeevan Mission dues clearance post Cabinet funding boost.
Extension and funding boost to aid project execution and sector cash flows.
news.summary:
KEC expects ₹800 crore Jal Jeevan Mission dues clearance post Cabinet funding boost.
Extension and funding boost to aid project execution and sector cash flows.

news.title:
Water and pump stocks surge up to 20% after Jal Jeevan Mission extension, with a total outlay of ₹8.69 lakh crore approved.
Top gainers include Denta Water, Shakti Pumps, Indian Hume Pipe, Vishnu Prakash R Punglia; KEC International and VA Tech Wabag also rise.
news.summary:
Water and pump stocks surge up to 20% after Jal Jeevan Mission extension, with a total outlay of ₹8.69 lakh crore approved.
Top gainers include Denta Water, Shakti Pumps, Indian Hume Pipe, Vishnu Prakash R Punglia; KEC International and VA Tech Wabag also rise.

news.title:
KEC International received Rs 600 crore from pending Jal Jeevan Mission dues.
Payments' origin unclear; Oman operations normal, Saudi has refinery delays.
news.summary:
KEC International received Rs 600 crore from pending Jal Jeevan Mission dues.
Payments' origin unclear; Oman operations normal, Saudi has refinery delays.

news.title:
KEC International repaid ₹75 Cr for listed commercial paper maturing on March 5, 2026.
Payment details were submitted to BSE; compliance with SEBI guidelines confirmed.
news.summary:
KEC International repaid ₹75 Cr for listed commercial paper maturing on March 5, 2026.
Payment details were submitted to BSE; compliance with SEBI guidelines confirmed.

news.title:
Indian EPC firms like L&T and KEC Intl face execution risks due to Iran-Israel conflict impacting Middle Eastern markets.
Shares of L&T fell 5%, KPIL dropped, while Middle East remains crucial for energy and infra projects.
news.summary:
Indian EPC firms like L&T and KEC Intl face execution risks due to Iran-Israel conflict impacting Middle Eastern markets.
Shares of L&T fell 5%, KPIL dropped, while Middle East remains crucial for energy and infra projects.
